debug_info.goal:
α : Type
language : ContextFreeLanguage α
h_eps_not_in_language : ε ∉ ↑language
nt : Type
cfg : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
h_cfg_gen_is_lang : coerceLang α cfg.Z cfg.GeneratedLanguage = ↑language
nt₂ : Type
h_eps_not_gen : ε ∉ cfg.GeneratedLanguage
cfg_CNF : { cfg₂ // isInChomskyNormalForm α nt₂ cfg₂ } := generate_equivalent_CNF α nt nt₂ ⟨cfg, h_eps_not_gen⟩
h_cfg_CNF_gen_is_lang :
  coerceLang α cfg.Z cfg.GeneratedLanguage = coerceLang α (↑cfg_CNF).Z (↑cfg_CNF).GeneratedLanguage
z : ↑{z | z ∈ ↑language ∧ z.len ≥ 2 ^ (↑cfg_CNF).V.card}
z₂ : Word { x // x ∈ (↑cfg_CNF).Z }
z₂_mem✝ : z₂ ∈ (↑cfg_CNF).GeneratedLanguage ∧ coerceWord α (↑cfg_CNF).Z z₂ = ↑z
z_eq_z₂ : coerceWord α (↑cfg_CNF).Z z₂ = ↑z
z₂_mem :
  ∀ {p : Prop},
    (∀ (a : Inhabited ((↑cfg_CNF).ContextFreeDerivation [Sum.inl (↑cfg_CNF).start] (Sum.inr <$> z₂))), p) → p
h_exists_deriv_z₂ : Inhabited ((↑cfg_CNF).ContextFreeDerivation [Sum.inl (↑cfg_CNF).start] (Sum.inr <$> z₂))
default_deriv_z₂ : (↑cfg_CNF).ContextFreeDerivation [Sum.inl (↑cfg_CNF).start] (Sum.inr <$> z₂) := default
proof_exhaustive : default_deriv_z₂.exhaustiveCondition
default_derivTree_z₂ : (↑cfg_CNF).DerivationTree := default_deriv_z₂.toDerivationTree proof_exhaustive ⋯
defaultDerivTree_z₂_respects_result :
  (default_deriv_z₂.toDerivationTree proof_exhaustive ⋯).result = (Sum.inr <$> z₂).VZtoZ proof_exhaustive
x✝ : DecidableEq { x // x ∈ (↑cfg_CNF).V } := sorry
defaultDerivTree_z₂_respects_start : ContextFreeGrammar.DerivationTree.startingSymbol ⋯ = (↑cfg_CNF).start
lemma_deriv_leaf_count : default_derivTree_z₂.result.len = default_derivTree_z₂.collectLeaves'.length
lemma_deriv_log : ∃ path, path.derivation.length ≥ z₂.len.log2
lemma_multiple_var :
  default_deriv_z₂.length ≥ (↑cfg_CNF).V.card → ∃ var u' u'' deriv₁ deriv₂ deriv₃, Sum.inl var ∈ u' ∧ Sum.inl var ∈ u''
⊢ ∃ u v w x y,
    ↑z = u * v * w * x * y ∧
      (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w * x).len ≤ 2 ^ (↑cfg_CNF).V.card ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), u * v ^ k * w * x ^ k * y ∈ ↑language

          cases' h_double_var with h_var_in_u' h_var_in_u''
          use (coerceWord (deriv₁.result.VZtoZ proof_exhaustive)),
              (coerceWord ((deriv₂.result.VZtoZ proof_exhaustive).drop (deriv₁.result.VZtoZ proof_exhaustive).length)),
              (coerceWord ((deriv₃.result.VZtoZ proof_exhaustive).drop (deriv₂.result.VZtoZ proof_exhaustive).length)),
              (coerceWord ((Sum.inr <$> z₂).drop (deriv₃.result.VZtoZ proof_exhaustive).length)),
              (coerceWord ((Sum.inr <$> z₂).drop (Sum.inr <$> z₂).length))
          constructor
          · rfl
          constructor
          · sorry
          constructor
          · sorry
          intro k
          sorry

have h_z_len : z.val.len ≥ 2 ^ cfg_CNF.val.V.card := z.prop.right
          have h_z₂_len : z₂.len = z.val.len := by
            rw [← z_eq_z₂]
            simp [coerceWord, Word.map_length]
          rw [h_z₂_len] at h_z_len
          have h_log : z₂.len.log2 ≥ cfg_CNF.val.V.card := by
            apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
            apply Nat.log2_le_log2
            exact h_z_len
          cases lemma_deriv_log with
          | intro path h_path_len =>
            have h_deriv_len : default_deriv_z₂.length ≥ cfg_CNF.val.V.card := by
              calc
                default_deriv_z₂.length = path.derivation.length := rfl
                _ ≥ z₂.len.log2 := h_path_len
                _ ≥ cfg_CNF.val.V.card := h_log
            cases lemma_multiple_var h_deriv_len with
            | intro var u' u'' deriv₁ deriv₂ deriv₃ h_vars =>
              use (u' : Word α).map Sum.inr, (u''.drop (u'.length) : Word α).map Sum.inr, (z₂.take (u'.length) : Word α).map Sum.inr, (z₂.drop (u''.length) : Word α).map Sum.inr, (z₂.drop (z₂.length) : Word α).map Sum.inr
              constructor
              · sorry
              constructor
              · sorry
              constructor
              · sorry
              intro k
              sorry
